CVE-2020-25787.title: An issue was discovered in Tiny Tiny RSS (aka tt-rss) before 2020 ...
CVE-2020-25787.description: An issue was discovered in Tiny Tiny RSS (aka tt-rss) before 2020-09-16. It does not validate all URLs before requesting them.

CVE-2020-25788.title: An issue was discovered in Tiny Tiny RSS (aka tt-rss) before 2020 ...
CVE-2020-25788.description: An issue was discovered in Tiny Tiny RSS (aka tt-rss) before 2020-09-16. imgproxy in plugins/af_proxy_http/init.php mishandles $_REQUEST["url"] in an error message.

CVE-2020-25789.title: An issue was discovered in Tiny Tiny RSS (aka tt-rss) before 2020 ...
CVE-2020-25789.description: An issue was discovered in Tiny Tiny RSS (aka tt-rss) before 2020-09-16. The cached_url feature mishandles JavaScript inside an SVG document.
